prompt: Create a hyper-realistic VOGUE magazine cover featuring the same woman (keep face identical). She is seated in a relaxed editorial pose on a sculptural sofa. Lighting: soft diffused studio light with luxury glow. Background: minimal beige/cream studio with fashion shadows.
